body_txt: A character chooses an alias by translating their name into some foreign language, which may be lampshaded as uninspired . See also You Are the Translated Foreign Word . If the character's name is changed because the work itself is being translated into a foreign language, it's a Dub Name Change . When a character or family emigrates to a new country and changes their name permanently, it's a Naturalized Name . If a name isn't translated but just pronounced more fancily, that's Pretentious Pronunciation . This is almost Real Name as an Alias , where a person's real name is used as an alias's basis, but without any translation getting involved.
